name: Syracuse Cooperative
description_short: Member-owned credit union serving Syracuse with checking, savings, loans, and financial counseling. NCUA-insured with community-focused lending including immigration loans and homebuyer grants.
description_long:
Cooperative Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution based in Syracuse, New York, with routing number 221381935. The credit union operates multiple branches across Syracuse (Erie Boulevard East, South Avenue, Burt Street, and a new location coming to North Salina Street) and emphasizes community investment and financial inclusion as core values. Founded on principles of cooperative banking, the institution serves individuals and small businesses with a stated mission that "all people deserve to thrive." The organization operates under NCUA insurance, providing member deposits with federal protection.

Cooperative Federal offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including share accounts (checking and savings), money market accounts, IRAs, and certificates of deposit. On the lending side, they provide auto loans, personal loans, mortgages, home equity lines of credit, small business loans, and specialized products like immigration loans, holiday loans, and emergency small-dollar loans. They also offer credit builder programs, debt consolidation services, and skip-a-pay options. Members can access online banking, make loan payments online, and receive financial counseling from certified counselors at no cost.

What distinguishes Cooperative Federal is its explicit focus on underserved populations and community economic development. The credit union offers homebuyer dream grants, financial counseling classes and webinars, youth life skills programs, and has partnered with Inclusiv Business Forward to expand lending to entrepreneurs facing barriers to capital. They provide specialized products like immigration loans and operate a small business pitch competition with cash prizes. The institution also maintains community investment certificates and hosts an annual membership meeting with community dinner.

Cooperative Federal is best suited for Syracuse-area residents and small business owners seeking affordable, community-minded banking with financial counseling support. As a credit union, membership is required, which is a standard trade-off for member-owner governance and typically lower fees than traditional banks. The institution's specific focus on immigration loans and homebuyer programs makes it particularly valuable for these underserved markets.
services: Mortgages and home equity lines of credit
Small business loans and NYS contractor financing
Credit builder loans and club membership
Emergency and holiday loans with skip-a-pay options
pros: No-cost financial counseling from certified counselors available to members
Specialized immigration loans designed for underserved populations
Homebuyer Dream Grants program provides direct financial assistance for home purchases
Multiple convenient Syracuse branch locations with extended Saturday hours at main location (10am-1pm)
Small business support including SBA-style loans, contractor financing, and pitch competition with cash prizes
Credit builder and emergency loan programs specifically designed for low-income members
Partnership with Inclusiv Business Forward expands capital access for entrepreneurs facing barriers
cons: Three of four branch locations have limited weekday hours (12pm-5pm or 10am-3pm), limiting accessibility for working members
North Salina Street branch permanently closed with replacement location opening date still TBD, creating service gaps
Membership requirement restricts access to non-members (standard for credit unions but still a limitation)
Limited geographic service area (Syracuse-based only with no indication of wider branch network or shared branching details)
Website does not display specific APR ranges, fees, or rate information, requiring direct contact for loan/account pricing
best_for: First-time homebuyers in Syracuse seeking down payment assistance and financial education
Small business owners and entrepreneurs, particularly those facing capital barriers
Immigrants seeking specialized lending products and community-focused banking
Low-income Syracuse residents needing credit building, emergency funds, and financial counseling
diagnosis: Cooperative Federal is best for Syracuse-area residents and small business owners seeking affordable, community-focused banking with strong financial counseling and specialized programs for underserved populations like first-time homebuyers and immigrants. Membership in the credit union is required to access services, and branch accessibility is somewhat limited due to extended closing hours at most locations and a permanent branch closure still awaiting relocation.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
